text: Bitcoin's modest 2.3% gain alongside Ethereum's stronger 6.4% rally suggests traders are rotating into altcoins despite extreme fear readings, with Bitcoin dominance holding steady at 56.4% indicating no panic capitulation. The $147B in 24-hour volume remains robust even as the Fear & Greed index sits at 20, implying continued conviction buying rather than forced selling. Smaller caps like SOL (up 7.6%) outpacing Bitcoin signals selective risk appetite among those willing to deploy capital in this low-sentiment environment.
